items.prompt: Track A in learn_digital means practice on…
items.explain: Track A is the workbook track: tables, encodings, and timing sketches by hand.

choices: Browser concept labs and quick feedback
items.explain: Track B builds intuition in the browser; the workbook track still hardens the idea.

items.prompt: This course teaches deep HDL syntax (Verilog always blocks and ports).
items.explain: learn_digital is concepts without deep HDL; Verilog and SystemVerilog come in later courses.

items.prompt: A good first rhythm for a lab module is…
choices: Skip the README and only watch video
Browser lab for the idea, then a workbook sketch
Only copy answers without a checklist
items.explain: Browser first for intuition, then paper for fidelity, is the recommended path.
